card_description: Pris Stratton (meaning "Pris = prismatic / prissy") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Basic pleasure-model android who hides with Isidore. Name note: Stratton = stratified, layered identity. Her friendship with Isidore tests whether empathy can cross the human-android divide. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
